title: rhaka #4469
definition:
1) empty, i.e. a senseless, empty headed man
 2) a term of reproach used among the Jews in the time of Christ
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) empty, i.e. a senseless, empty headed man
 2) a term of reproach used among the Jews in the time of Christ
